title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. antaleonis
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. antaleonis, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial for treating various health conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. antaleonis include its ability to stimulate blood circulation, reduce swelling, and promote the healing of wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its health benefits.
